briefs.title: Enduring Powers of Attorney Can Now Be Witnessed Remotely via Video in BC
briefs.summary: Effective January 1, 2023, BC allows enduring powers of attorney to be signed and witnessed remotely using audiovisual technology, provided the witness is a lawyer or notary public.
briefs.action_required: If executing an enduring power of attorney remotely, ensure the witness is a BC lawyer or notary and the document states it was signed via the alternative process.

key_dates.label: BC remote witnessing for enduring powers of attorney takes effect
